notes: Pure-Python analysis module; built from scratch (~480 lines). Imports v0.9 simulator (ra_causal_dag_native_cert_overlap, ra_causal_dag_channel_workbench, ra_causal_dag_support_family_monotonicity) via dynamic importlib + sys.path. For each v0.9 trial: runs evaluate_native_overlap_certified_family on state to get rescue + native overlaps, then computes graph_coupled_orientation_link_overlap on the same state.dag via edge-pair-sign Jaccard. In-house OLS solver for partial correlation. v1_6 disconnection closure: rescue and orientation_overlap come from same DAG instance per trial.
5 unit tests including an end-to-end integration test that runs the v0.9 simulator on a tiny config (1 seed, 1 mode, 2 targets); all pass.
